title: Become an AI Native Cloud Engineer
summary: AWS Developers argues that junior cloud engineers should focus on fundamentals like security, reliability, cost, performance, and maintainability rather than coding alone, using AI agents as tools while understanding what and why to build. The video draws on Marc Brooker's perspective as a distinguished AWS engineer to discuss practical skills for new grads and career switchers in cloud engineering.
